name: Blaxel Sandbox
description: Persistent, isolated sandbox environments on Blaxel — develop and host apps with CodeInterpreter (Jupyter) or raw Sandbox mode

mode.description: Execution mode. 'interpreter' uses a Jupyter-powered CodeInterpreter (zero config). 'sandbox' uses a raw VM. Defaults to 'interpreter'.

image.description: Container image (sandbox mode only, ignored in interpreter mode). Defaults to 'blaxel/base-image:latest'.

memory.description: Memory allocation in MB. Defaults to 4096.

autoCreate.description: Auto-create the sandbox if it doesn't exist (sandbox mode only). Defaults to true.

workingDir.description: Default working directory inside sandboxes. Defaults to '/home'.

execTimeout.description: Default timeout for command execution in milliseconds. Defaults to 60000.

blaxel.description: Blaxel auth. Not needed when running on Blaxel (BL_CLOUD env is set). Otherwise falls back to 'bl login' credentials or environment variables.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: 'interpreter' for Jupyter-powered CodeInterpreter, 'sandbox' for raw VM.

image.label: Container Image
image.help: Sandbox mode only. Available: base-image, nextjs, vite, expo, py-app, ts-app, node.

blaxel.workspace.label: Blaxel Workspace
blaxel.workspace.help: Not needed when BL_CLOUD is set.

blaxel.apiKey.label: Blaxel API Key
blaxel.apiKey.help: Not needed when BL_CLOUD is set.
